ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "heel_toe_measurement" TEXT /* Heel-toe measurement in inches */,
  "us_men" REAL /* US Men's shoe size */,
  "us_women" REAL /* US Women's shoe size */,
  "uk" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "eu" TEXT /* EU shoe size */,
  "jp" REAL /* JP shoe size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the model is designed for (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the model (e.g., Running, Casual, Basketball) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model */,
  "colorways" TEXT /* Colorways of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the size belongs to */,
  "us_men" REAL /* US Men's shoe size */,
  "us_women" REAL /* US Women's shoe size */,
  "uk" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "eu" TEXT /* EU shoe size */,
  "jp" REAL /* JP shoe size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory record belongs to */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory is expected to be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, inventory manager, data analyst) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., inventory, orders) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion history record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the history record belongs to */,
  "us_men" REAL /* US Men's shoe size */,
  "us_women" REAL /* US Women's shoe size */,
  "uk" REAL /* UK shoe size */,
  "eu" TEXT /* EU shoe size */,
  "jp" REAL /* JP shoe size */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the size conversion was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the size conversion */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size conversion change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who received the recommendation */,
  "heel_toe_measurement" TEXT /* Heel-toe measurement in inches */,
  "recommended_us_men" REAL /* Recommended US Men's shoe size */,
  "recommended_us_women" REAL /* Recommended US Women's shoe size */,
  "recommended_uk" REAL /* Recommended UK shoe size */,
  "recommended_eu" TEXT /* Recommended EU shoe size */,
  "recommended_jp" REAL /* Recommended JP shoe size */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., 0.8) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the measurement */,
  "heel_toe_measurement" TEXT /* Heel-toe measurement in inches */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the request */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* Size to convert from */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* Size to convert to */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion result */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request the result belongs to */,
  "converted_size" TEXT /* Converted size */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the conversion (e.g., 0.8) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_results_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES size_conversion_requests ("request_id")
)
